steps.title: Find x from the first equation
Substitute into the second equation
steps.content:
Use $x=11$ in the second equation to find $y$.
$$y=8(11)-86$$
$$y=88-86$$
$$y=2$$

steps.title: Graph as a check
steps.content: The two equations intersect at the same ordered pair found by substitution, and its $y$-coordinate is $2$. The answer is D.
